name: DNS over HTTPS for C2
description: Detects use of DNS over HTTPS services that may bypass DNS monitoring
query:
// Detect DNS over HTTPS usage
// Trigger on connections to known DoH providers
events from proxy
where domain matches "(?i)(dns\.google|cloudflare-dns\.com|dns\.quad9\.net|doh\.opendns\.com|mozilla\.cloudflare-dns\.com)"
  and url matches "(?i)/dns-query"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 20
within 300 seconds
